caption.full:
Leven Rambin's life was saved after a routine surgery.

Actress Leven Rambin underwent a routine laparoscopy for endometriosis. During the procedure, a doctor accidentally nicked her aorta, an event doctors called a 'one-in-a-million' accident. Rambin was forced to withdraw from an upcoming Netflix series due to the complication.

What matters most to you when a surgery goes unexpectedly wrong?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
